equivalence_argument: Neither execute_one nor execute_one_with_state_hook invokes SPC batch verification before strategy setup; both only refresh registry state before execution.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Both block execution paths lack the configured pre-strategy SPC batch verification step.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal/crates/node/src/executor.rs execute_one updates registry, then sets up the strategy and executes transactions.
execute_one_with_state_hook has the same registry-update-first flow and no batch verifier call before strategy setup.

rationale: The subject says batch SPC verification was extracted and used in both execute paths, and the diff adds perform_spc_batch_verification plus calls it from execute_one and execute_one_with_state_hook before strategy setup. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: BasicBlockExecutor must perform SPC batch verification before constructing/executing the block strategy in both execute_one and execute_one_with_state_hook when an SPC verifier is configured; if no verifier is configured, the step is skipped without failing.
suggested_falsification_tests: Configure an SPC verifier that records calls or fails, then invoke execute_one and execute_one_with_state_hook; both should call the verifier before apply_pre_execution_changes, and both should propagate verifier failure. With no verifier configured, both should continue.
summary: Neither block execution path runs the required SPC batch verification step.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Invoke execute_one and execute_one_with_state_hook with a failing SPC batch verifier and assert both fail before strategy construction; current paths do not call the batch verifier.
title: Both execution paths run SPC batch verification
